title: Hardcore Mode 2.0
description: The most difficult mod in all of Minecraft. Do you dare to play it?
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Hardcore_Mode_2.0/BH_HM2_header.webp) Hardcore Mode 2.0 is not just any mod, it is a radical change in the way you play Minecraft. From now on, you will only have ONE life, you will not be able to play again if you die, but no, it's not just that, you WILL NOT REGENERATE HEARTS either, the only way to regenerate life will be with golden apples, potions or similar, no food. Will you be able to defeat the dragon under these conditions? ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Hardcore_Mode_2.0/BH_HM2_banner2.webp) This new mod is ideal for all those players who want to live a new gaming experience. Of course, much more difficult and interesting. ## Main features: - A single life, with this mod you will not be able to return to the game once you have died. - You will not recover life in the normal way, only with golden apples, potions or similar. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Hardcore_Mode_2.0/BH_HM2_banner1.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screesnhots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Hardcore_Mode_2.0/BH_HM2_banner3.webp) ![Screesnhots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RDTgXmUU/images/48f0b82187ab6ff2537bb321f1db1c093f8acdd2.jpeg) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RDTgXmUU/images/f4099e2d8ebce725d5112e00418a4b8dc2c28781.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
